'''dajata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dyehouse|dyehouse]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dyehouse|dyehouse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dajata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæjætæth|dæjætæth]] || [[word:dæjætæj|dæjætæj]] || [[word:dæjætæsh|dæjætæsh]] || [[word:dæjætæ|dæjætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dajajatath|dajajatath]] || [[word:dajajataj|dajajataj]] || [[word:dajajatash|dajajatash]] || [[word:dajajata|dajajata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dajatath|dajatath]] || [[word:dajataj|dajataj]] || [[word:dajatash|dajatash]] || [[word:dajata|dajata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dajaftath|dajaftath]] || [[word:dajaftaj|dajaftaj]] || [[word:dajaftash|dajaftash]] || [[word:dajaftaf|dajaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dajatatha|dajatatha]] || [[word:dajataja|dajataja]] || [[word:dajatasha|dajatasha]] || [[word:dajataka|dajataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dajatath|dajatath]] || [[word:dajataj|dajataj]] || [[word:dajatash|dajatash]] || [[word:dajata|dajata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dajatathal|dajatathal]] || [[word:dajatajal|dajatajal]] || [[word:dajatashal|dajatashal]] || [[word:dajatakal|dajatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dajatathatha|dajatathatha]] || [[word:dajatajaja|dajatajaja]] || [[word:dajatashasha|dajatashasha]] || [[word:dajataka|dajataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dajatathan|dajatathan]] || [[word:dajatajan|dajatajan]] || [[word:dajatashan|dajatashan]] || [[word:dajatakan|dajatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dajatathaoro|dajatathaoro]] || [[word:dajatajaoro|dajatajaoro]] || [[word:dajatashaoro|dajatashaoro]] || [[word:dajatakaoro|dajatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
